items.name_en: ЁЯЧпЁЯТ░
items.name_cn:
ЁЯЧпЁЯТ░
тЦкя╕ПLE 5 ├А 7тЦк
The Y brand's much-anticipated underarm bag is finally here!!я╕П
I loved the name at first sight; it is inspired by the niche film 'Cl├йo from 5 to 7', telling the story of the 5-7 PM gap between work and home, and how the protagonist Cl├йo gradually reveals her independent side. Looking back at the bag itself, the silhouette is simple and structured, appearing firm yet not too sharp.
Paired with the brand's signature insert buckle, the overall look gives a unique temperament that is both classic and elegant, yet very modern and stylish.
Size: 24.5x16x6cm
Model No.: 657228 Patent Leather

items.name_en: ЁЯжЛЁЯжЛDior Book Tote Grand-Via Garden
items.name_cn: ЁЯжЛЁЯжЛDior Book Tote Grand-Via Garden

specs.rawTitle: ЁЯжЛЁЯжЛDior Book Tote Grand-Via Garden

items.name_en: ЁЯжЛЁЯжЛNew Arrival
items.name_cn:
ЁЯжЛЁЯжЛNew Arrival
This Book Tote bag, designed by Dior Women's Creative Director Maria Grazia Chiuri, is a signature piece embodying Dior aesthetics. Crafted from white fabric and meticulously embellished with multicolor Dior Jardin Botanique embroidery, the romantic floral pattern is inspired by the Grand-Via garden cherished by Monsieur Dior. It accommodates various daily essentials. Small size, featuring a CHRISTIAN DIOR PARIS signature on the front, showcasing Dior's exquisite craftsmanship, and can be carried by hand or over the shoulder.
Size: 26cm
Front features CHRISTIAN DIOR PARIS signature
Includes dust bag
Made in Italy
Style No.: 8002
